title: Constructum
description: an Assortment of mods that enhance core aspects of Minecraft while staying true to the base vanilla experience.
body:
# **Constructum**

> a Modpack with focus on QoL features, multiplayer, and long term playthroughs. I've decided to trim down on the amount of content mods, mainly focusing on Create and Farmer's Delight with a few smaller mods like Portfolio, Clayworks, Woodworks, etc. to keep the pack lightweight, stable and performance friendly. This pack revolves around staying true to the core sandbox nature of Minecraft whilst implementing custom recipes, textures, and configurations that ensure every addition complements eachother perfectly. If you are searching for a modpack tailored towards a set progression path/questing, I'd recommend looking elsewhere.
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
### **Features**

- Create & Farmer's Delight

- Subtle Visual Improvements

- Brand new Decoration Blocks

- Built-in Resource and Data pack
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
### **Shaders**
The Pre-installed Shaders for Constructum is BSL Shaders
- Alternative
  - Complementary Shaders - Reimagined
